rulings.Case Title: OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BRUCE I. GILBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Sunset Scavenger Company'S Motion For Protective Order.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 18, 2018, Line 1. Defendant Sunset Scavenger Company's Motion For Protective Order. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The Motion to Quash or Delay PMK Deposition is DENIED. Deposition to be set on a mutually agreeable date between October 15 and 19, 2018. Motion to Limit the scope of documents sought is GRANTED as to Request Number Five, and is otherwise DENIED. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZACHARY BOOKMAN ET AL VS. FRANK NOLAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 18, 2018, Line 2. DEFENDANTS FRANK NOLAN, ANDREW WARREN, VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to October 18, 2018. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than September 28, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZACHARY BOOKMAN ET AL VS. FRANK NOLAN ET AL

rulings.Case Title: HUONG (AMY) THAI-SILVA VS. MINH THAI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 18, 2018, Line 3. CROSS COMPLAINANTS MINH THAI AS TRUSTEE, MINH THAI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication. Continued to October 1, 2018 on Court's own motion. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID K. UTHMAN ET AL VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Pg & E'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Planitiffs' Verified First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 18, 2018, Line 4. Defendant PG & E'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Planitiffs' Verified First Amended Complaint. GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts giving rise to prayer for punitive damages re: conscious disregard for life and safety. Plaintiffs and their counsel are ordered to comply with CCP 435.5 in future. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION ET AL VS. VALSTOCK MANAGEMENT COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 18, 2018, Line 5. DEFENDANT 371 BROADWAY STREET, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address all issues raised by Defendant in light of all authorities cited by defendant. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint alleging facts (not conclusions) forming the basis of this Defendant's liability as to these Plaintiffs. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 18, 2018, Line 6. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction. OFF CALENDAR, Notice of Settlement on file. =(501/REQ)
